projectName: Constitution and Basic Law Parent-child Workshop 2017
venue: Shopping malls (inc. Mikiki, Tuen Mun Town Plaza, etc.)
date: Mon May 01 2017 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Planning, Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, Concept Development, Souvenir Sourcing
challenge: The client aimed to educate families on complex constitutional principles, facing the challenge of transforming abstract legal concepts into an accessible and engaging learning experience for both parents and children.
solution: Our strategic approach involved designing an immersive parent-child workshop centered around interactive table games and engaging activities, successfully making foundational legal knowledge enjoyable and easy to grasp for participants.
slidesUrl:
Constitutional and Mainland Affairs Bureau: Igniting Civic Understanding Through Play

**The Challenge:** Transforming abstract constitutional principles into an engaging, accessible learning experience for families.

**Our Solution:** Developed an interactive workshop featuring custom-designed giant table games and Q&A sessions, fostering discovery and collaborative learning.

**The Impact:** Successfully created a fun, memorable platform where families collaboratively explored and understood essential civic knowledge, achieving the client's educational outreach goals.

"Constitution and Basic Law Parent-child Workshop 2020: A Stellar Approach to Civic Education

Challenge:
Transforming complex legal concepts into an engaging, focused learning experience for families within bustling public spaces, ensuring sustained interest.

Our Strategic Approach:

Key Outcomes:
*   Successfully simplified core legal concepts for all ages.
*   Achieved high engagement and positive feedback from diverse family audiences.
*   Set a new benchmark for dynamic and impactful civic education in community settings."

projectName: “Anti-drug Info Zone: Stride Ahead Into A Drug-free Future” Roving Exhibition
client: Narcotics Division (ND) of the Security Bureau
venue: Central Market, The University of Hong Kong, MegaBox, etc.
date: Sat Jun 01 2024 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Planning, Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, Concept Development
challenge: 傳統禁毒宣傳難以吸引年輕族群，且活潑的星際主題可能稀釋訊息嚴肅性，導致公眾輕視毒品危害，同時難以確保參與者在遊戲後能真正內化反毒知識。
solution: 透過「星際/科幻」主題與遊戲化互動裝置，結合社群媒體預熱及KOL推廣，並確保核心訊息清晰及由權威人士背書，旨在提升年輕族群參與度，深化反毒知識內化，並透過線上平台延續影響力。
slidesUrl: "Key Visuals & Messaging for 'Anti-drug Info Zone' Campaign"

projectName: Stride Ahead Into A Drug-free Future 34th Hong Kong Book Fair
date: Sat Jun 01 2024 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Planning, Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, KOL / MI Line up, Artist Endorsement
challenge: A major challenge of this campaign was taking a serious topic and making it accessible to children, ensuring that the core educational impact remained strong despite the bustling, high-traffic setting of a book fair
solution: By utilizing a futuristic space theme, an interactive robotic arm game, a drug-effect simulator camera, and a reading corner, these diverse and innovative experiences successfully integrated anti-drug education into fun activities. This approach effectively engaged children and deepened their understanding of the core message.
slidesUrl: "ACAN x 34th Hong Kong Book Fair: 'Stride Ahead Into A Drug-free Future' - Transformed serious anti-drug education into an engaging, interactive experience for children using a futuristic space theme, gamified learning, and multimedia installations, achieving high engagement and impactful message delivery."

projectName: 完善選舉制度巡迴展覽 2024
venue: 室外 (例如沙田公園、城門谷運動場) 及室內場地 (例如社區客廳、政府大樓)
date: Sun Sep 01 2024 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, Concept Development, Souvenir Sourcing
challenge: 現有展覽雖能初步吸引公眾，但未能有效深化對複雜選舉制度的理解，且在處理公眾疑慮及激發長期知情參與方面仍有不足，存在過度簡化議題的風險。
solution: 透過年輕化、生活化的主題設計與吉祥物「票箱寶寶」，結合易於裝拆且靈活的互動遊戲（如「我『推』的地方選區」及「立法會議席彈乒乓」），在室內外巡迴展覽中寓教於樂。同時，透過策略性紀念品及多渠道公關整合，旨在深化公眾對完善選舉制度的理解，並鼓勵持續參與。
slidesUrl: {"title":"完善選舉制度巡迴展覽 2024：深化公民參與與理解","key_points":["挑戰：超越表面娛樂，提升對複雜選舉概念的深度理解與長期參與。","策略：創新互動遊戲、年輕化設計、多場地靈活部署，促進雙向對話。","目標：激發知情參與、有效處理公眾疑慮，建立長期公民意識。","亮點：吉祥物「票箱寶寶」、主題遊戲、策略性紀念品及整合式公關敘事。"]}

projectName: 《憲法》與《基本法》及 物流運輸樞紐
venue: Shopping malls  (inc. CityWalk2, Yoho Mall II, Amoy Plaza, etc.)
date: Sun Sep 01 2024 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Planning, Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, Concept Development, Souvenir Sourcing
challenge: Engaging a casual shopping mall audience with the serious, complex topics of the Constitution and Basic Law, especially for youth, proved challenging amidst distractions and potential information overload. Traditional methods struggled to capture attention.
solution: We transformed the exhibition into an interactive "logistics hub" featuring gamified elements like a drone mission, modern visuals, and focused content. This multi-sensory approach, combined with strategic promotion and trained staff, successfully made complex legal concepts accessible and engaging for families and youth in a lively mall environment.
slidesUrl: "Constitution and Basic Law Roving Exhibition 2024: Transforming complex legal education into an engaging, interactive 'logistics hub' experience for Hong Kong families and youth in shopping malls, featuring gamified elements like the 'A-Drone-able Mission' to foster civic understanding and celebrate the PRC's 75th anniversary."

projectName: 《憲法》與《基本法》及科研探索
venue: Shopping malls  (inc. SPOT,  Amoy Plaza, CityWalk  etc.)
date: Sun Sep 01 2024 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Planning, Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, Concept Development, Souvenir Sourcing
challenge: The Constitution and Basic Law Roving Exhibition faces the challenge of transforming complex legal concepts into engaging, deeply educational experiences for families in bustling mall environments, ensuring interactive elements go beyond mere entertainment and maintain adult appeal.
solution: The exhibition adopts a 'Tech Exploration' theme, transforming venues into interactive 'laboratories' with engaging games and Kahoot! quizzes. This approach, combined with a vibrant visual design and a cute owl mascot, aims to simplify complex legal concepts, deepen understanding of the Constitution and Basic Law, and celebrate the 75th anniversary of the PRC, ensuring an enjoyable yet educational experience for families.
slidesUrl: {"title":"Constitution and Basic Law Roving Exhibition 2024: Engaging Future Citizens","bullets":["Challenge: Bridging complex legal education with family-friendly engagement in dynamic environments.","Solution: Innovative 'Tech Exploration' theme, interactive lab-style games, and Kahoot! quizzes for deep learning.","Impact: Fostering civic awareness and celebrating the PRC's 75th anniversary through immersive experiences.","Call to Action: Join us at a mall near you this September!"]}

projectName: Okinawa Food Trade Fair
date: Tue Oct 01 2024 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Planning, Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, Concept Development, KOL / MI Line up, Media Pitching, PR Consulting
challenge: Traditional food trade fairs are often perceived as monotonous and uninspiring, failing to offer the dynamic, lifestyle-oriented experience modern attendees and B2B partners seek.
solution: The "Okinawa Food Trade Fair" redefined industry standards by transforming a conventional trade show into an immersive culinary and business event. It innovatively blended Okinawan ingredients with Japanese cocktail culture, featuring renowned mixologist Piko Wong at the upscale CulinArt 1867. This strategic approach fostered high-quality B2B networking during off-peak hours, enhanced by real-time translation, creating a unique, stylish, and highly effective platform for collaboration.
slidesUrl: {"title":"Okinawa Food Trade Fair: Redefining Culinary Business Events","key_takeaways":["Challenge: Overcoming 'boring' traditional food fair image.","Solution: Cross-cultural culinary experience with Japanese cocktails & Okinawan ingredients.","Key Differentiator: Immersive B2B networking at CulinArt 1867, featuring Piko Wong.","Impact: Elevated brand image, expanded market reach, successful business collaborations."]}

projectName: 5S良好工作場所整理 巡迴展覽
date: Wed Jan 01 2025 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, Concept Development, Souvenir Sourcing
challenge: 挑戰在於將「5S工作場所管理」這個可能枯燥的議題，轉化為對公務員及公眾而言既實用又具吸引力的互動體驗，打破傳統展覽的單調感，並有效傳達核心訊息。
solution: Firebean透過實體化概念、生活化百貨設計風格，以及結合辦公室模型和趣味扭蛋機等互動元素，成功將5S理念融入遊戲與實用紀念品中，大幅提升參與者的學習興趣與記憶度。
slidesUrl: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/19rmqCzgKD8y2ZiLxkiAqhhkV6_t-8QAumZkSi0Eu9C0/edit

projectName: Roving exhibition in commemoration of the 60th anniversary of Action Committee Against Narcotics
client: Narcotics Division (ND) of the Security Bureau
venue: Hong Kong City Hall, Hong Kong Baptist University, Times Square, etc.
date: Sat Feb 01 2025 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Planning, Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, Concept Development, PR Consulting
challenge: The challenge is to overcome public stereotypes of government events and ensure broad appeal for the 60th-anniversary anti-drug exhibition, especially among youth, transforming a serious topic into an engaging experience.
solution: Our solution leverages cutting-edge interactive technology like VR and robotics, alongside engaging social media content and a friendly mascot, to create a dynamic, multi-sensory roving exhibition. This approach aims to captivate diverse audiences, particularly youth, making the 60th-anniversary anti-drug message relatable, memorable, and impactful through an innovative 'past, present, future' narrative.
slidesUrl: "Comprehensive PR strategy overview for the Roving exhibition in commemoration of the 60th anniversary of Action Committee Against Narcotics, detailing objectives, target audience, key messages, and channel-specific content plans."

projectName: One Earth Submit 2025
date: Sat Mar 01 2025 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Media Pitching
challenge: The global imperative to bridge the green funding gap and accelerate sustainable innovation demanded a platform for diverse leaders to forge actionable, systemic change.
solution: The One Earth Summit successfully convened over 300 influential leaders, catalyzing critical dialogues and reinforcing Hong Kong's leadership in green finance and technology for impactful investment and innovation.
slidesUrl: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/19rmqCzgKD8y2ZiLxkiAqhhkV6_t-8QAumZkSi0Eu9C0/edit

projectName: 2025「選舉進社區」巡迴互動展覽
date: Sun Jun 01 2025 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Planning, Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, Concept Development
challenge: Public apathy towards the 2025 Legislative Council election is a key challenge, with traditional outreach methods struggling to engage diverse demographics, particularly younger professionals, who perceive content as overly simplistic or politically biased.
solution: The 2025 "Elections in the Community" Roving Interactive Exhibition aims to demystify the electoral process through interactive, family-friendly games in major malls. Solutions include gamified learning (e.g., "各投各位", "掃走貪腐", "選舉知識對對碰"), direct simulation of voting, mandatory knowledge quizzes, clear explanations linking fun with informed voting, visual aids, multi-language support, and post-event online engagement to sustain interest.
slidesUrl: "2025「選舉進社區」巡迴互動展覽：活化公民參與新策略"

projectName: 《憲法》與《基本法》及能量充電站
venue: Shopping malls  (inc. Citywalk2,  Olympian City 2, The Wai, etc.)
date: Mon Sep 01 2025 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Planning, Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, Concept Development, PR Consulting
challenge: The Constitution and Basic Law Roving Exhibition struggles to engage the public, particularly families and youth in bustling shopping malls, often perceived as dry government propaganda rather than an accessible, interactive learning experience.
solution: By transforming the exhibition into an interactive 'Energy Station' with engaging booth games, a Roblox mini-game, and a unique claw machine souvenir redemption, the project aims to demystify complex legal concepts, making them relatable and enjoyable for families and youth in a vibrant mall setting.
slidesUrl: "Revolutionizing Civic Engagement: The Constitution and Basic Law 'Energy Station' Experience"

projectName: 《憲法》與《基本法》及貓頭鷹茶樓
venue: Shopping malls  (inc. Lok Fu Plaza,  Central Market, Cheung Fat Plaza, etc.)
date: Mon Sep 01 2025 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Planning, Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, Concept Development, PR Consulting
challenge: Transforming complex, serious legal concepts into engaging, non-preachy content for children in noisy mall environments, while ensuring parents perceive it as educational, not just entertainment, is the core challenge.
solution: The 'Owl Teahouse' workshop, a roving mall exhibition, transforms abstract legal concepts into engaging, relatable content via interactive tech. This innovative approach, supported by strategic PR, enhances accessibility and breaks down official stereotypes, fostering joyful family learning.
slidesUrl: {"title":"Constitution & Basic Law Parent-Child Workshop 2025: Engaging the Next Generation","bullets":["**Challenge:** Bridging the gap between complex legal concepts and engaging, child-friendly education in distracting environments, while managing public perception.","**Solution:** Innovative 'Owl Teahouse' theme with interactive tech (digital fish tank, bun-throwing game) in roving mall exhibitions.","**Impact:** Transforms abstract topics into relatable, fun learning experiences, enhancing accessibility and breaking down official stereotypes.","**Strategy:** Strategic PR and event design to foster joyful family learning and civic awareness."]}

solution: Translated with DeepL.com (free version)
slidesUrl:
{"title":"《科技提升職業安全與健康》2025-26 巡迴展覽：顛覆傳統，啟發未來","slide_1_headline":"打破沉悶刻板印象：政府活動也能引領潮流","slide_1_body":"公務員事務局《科技提升職業安全與健康》巡迴展覽，旨在透過創新科技與互動體驗，徹底改變公眾對職業安全健康的認知。我們將專業知識轉化為引人入勝的沉浸式體驗，讓每位參與者都能親身感受科技如何保障我們的日常工作與生活。","slide_2_headline":"核心策略：沉浸式互動與生活化連結","slide_2_body":"我們將展覽設計成一個高科技感的空間，採用不鏽鋼與鐵質支架，融合機械人元素。互動轉轉展板、具動畫聲效的線上遊戲，以及簡化的手機搖獎換禮品機制，都旨在提升參與感，將專業資訊生活化。活動不僅限於公務員，更強調其教育意義與社會價值，吸引廣大市民參與。","slide_3_headline":"預期效益：從「沉悶」到「啟發人心」","slide_3_body":"透過本次巡迴展覽，我們預期能有效提升公眾對職業安全健康的關注度與理解，打破政府活動的刻板印象。關鍵衡量指標將是參與者的滿意度、學習收穫與行為改變意向，而非僅僅入場人數。活動結束後，將建立線上知識庫，延續影響力。","slide_4_headline":"活動詳情與參與方式","slide_4_body":"日期：2026年2月
地點：政府大樓 (例如政府總部、工業貿易大樓等)
形式：巡迴展覽、互動科技體驗
主辦：公務員事務局
期待您的蒞臨，一同見證科技如何革新職業安全與健康！"}

projectName: New Balance x HKDA Dodgebee Championships
date: Sun Oct 01 2017 00:00:00 GMT+0800 (Hong Kong Standard Time)
scope: Event Planning, Event Coordination, Event Production, Theme Design, Concept Development
challenge: Integrating New Balance Eyewear's sports performance features into a dynamic dodgebee championship, ensuring strong brand visibility and direct product experience for target demographics, while navigating existing venue branding and boosting social media engagement.
solution: Firebean designed interactive games like Zorb Ball and dodgebee, requiring New Balance eyewear, and incorporated product displays with branded prizes. This seamlessly showcased eyewear durability and comfort, enhancing participant engagement and brand association.
slidesUrl: https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/19rmqCzgKD8y2ZiLxkiAqhhkV6_t-8QAumZkSi0Eu9C0/edit#slide=id.SLIDES_API1616812336_0
